# Paid Media Attribution Baseline

Use this baseline when attribution accuracy is the primary bottleneck.

## Core Moves

1. Define a single source of truth for channel naming and campaign hierarchy.
2. Enforce UTM normalization for every paid campaign.
3. Audit pixel and conversion API parity weekly.
